entry.title: IDC VA79811D0003 (P00010) awarded to QTC MEDICAL SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: VBA MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS UNDER PUBLIC LAW 104-275 | VA CONTRACT VA798-11-D-0003 | NO-COST MODIFICATION ISSUED TO UPDATE PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) IN SUPPORT OF MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS UNDER PL 104-275. CLOSELY ASSOCIATED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA79811D0003 (P00013) awarded to QTC MEDICAL SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: VBA MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS UNDER PUBLIC LAW 104-275 | VA CONTRACT VA798-11-D-0003 | THE PURPOSE OF THIS IN-SCOPE MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT NEW CLINS BY WHICH THE CONTRACTOR WILL MODIFY THE MEANS BY WHICH IT TRANSMITS MDE DATA TO AND FROM THE VA. THIS MODIFICATION IS NECESSARY BECAUSE VA IS MOVING TO A NEW SYSTEM WITHIN WHICH MDE DATA IS STORED. | CLOSELY ASSOCIATED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA79811D0003 (P00018) awarded to QTC MEDICAL SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS UNDER PL 104-275. | THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD A NEW CLIN 0034 TO ALLOW FOR THE PERFORMANCE OF PERIPHERAL NEUROPATHY SCREENING INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATIONS UNDER THE CONTRACT. THIS MOD IS CONSIDERED NO-COST AS NO ADDITIONAL FUNDING IS REQUIRED TO ADD THE CLIN. A PREVIOUSLY ESTABLISHED SUM OF FUNDING IS CURRENTLY OBLIGATED TO COVER THE COST OF EXAMINATIONS ORDERED UNDER THIS CONTRACT. | CLOSELY ASSOCIATED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA79811D0003 (P00019) awarded to QTC MEDICAL SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS UNDER PL 104-275. | THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE A REVISED PERIPHERAL NEUROPATHY CHECKLIST (ATTACHMENT G) INTO THE CONTRACT. | CLOSELY ASSOCIATED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)
